data.body:
Something weird is def going on with Claude:

Friend who’s a surgeon tried to get opus to create a schedule for his unit (a surprisingly hard problem with lots of constraints and rules). It kept screwing things up and not following rules.

I gave it to gpt 5.4 and it one shotted it in 17 minutes.
